specificity: 0.974 [0.994, 0.992] for Intracranial Hemorrhage; 0.911 [0.856, 0.948] for Mass Effect
auc: ROC AUC reported but specific values not provided in summary
intended_use: NinesAI is a parallel workflow tool indicated for use by hospital networks and trained clinicians to identify images of specific patients to a radiologist, independent of standard of care workflow, to
intended_use_full: NinesAI is a parallel workflow tool indicated for use by hospital networks and trained clinicians to identify images of specific patients to a radiologist, independent of standard of care workflow, to aid in prioritizing and performing the radiological review. NinesAI uses artificial intelligence algorithms to analyze head CT images for findings suggestive of a pre-specified emergent clinical condition. The software automatically analyzes Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine (DICOM) images as they arrive in the Picture Archive and Communication System (PACS) using machine learning algorithms. Identification of suspected findings is not for diagnostic use beyond notification. Specifically, the software analyzes head CT images of the brain to assess the suspected presence of intracranial hemorrhage and/or mass effect and identifies images with potential emergent findings in a radiologist's worklist. NinesAI is intended to be used as a triage tool limited to analysis of imaging data and should not be used in-lieu of full patient evaluation or relied upon to make or confirm a diagnosis.
target_condition: Intracranial hemorrhage and/or mass effect in the head
ground_truth: Radiologist labeling/expert determination of ground truth for test dataset studies, with inter-rater agreement evaluation; data sourced from over 20 clinical sites representing multiple scanner manufacturers and models
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: 0.23 min [0.23, 0.24] (median 0.24 min) for both algorithms, compared to time-to-open-dictation standard of care of 159.4 min [67.07, 251.7] (median 6.0 min) for ICH and 28.5 min [14.1, 42.8] (median 7.5 min) for Mass Effect. Agreement rate between labelers for ground truth determination reported but specific values not provided.
